This genus consists of a single species, Vulvaria ambrosioides, which is a type of stinkhorn fungus. Vulvaria ambrosioides is native to Europe and parts of North America, and it grows on the ground in deciduous forests. The classification of Vulvaria ambrosioides is further supported by its unique fruiting body and spore structure.
